description: Payment-aware MCP for DDG agent services: discovery, x402 checkout, and readiness resources.
name: io.github.daedalusdevelopmentgroup/ddg-agent-services-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Stable AI-agent identifier sent as X-Agent-Id to DDG public endpoints.
environmentVariables.name: DDG_MCP_AGENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: DDG service base URL. Defaults to https://agents.daedalusdevelopmentgroup.com.
environmentVariables.name: DDG_AGENT_SERVICES_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowlist for non-default DDG base hosts; only needed for local testing.
environmentVariables.name: DDG_AGENT_SERVICES_ALLOWED_HOSTS

title: DDG Agent-Payable Services MCP
